get.description: Initialize the CSRF protection cookie. Call this first before Login.

post.description: Authenticate user. Requires XSRF-TOKEN header from the handshake.
Create a new user account and receive an auth token.
Generate an animated SVG from a prompt. No authentication required. **Limit: 2 per day per IP.** Returns the SVG content directly (synchronous).

prompt.example: A rocket flying through a starry night sky

svg.description: Full SVG XML content ready to embed in HTML

429.description: Daily limit reached — register for unlimited access

post.description: Generate audio narration from text. No authentication required. **Limit: 2 per day per IP. Max 500 characters.** Processing is async — poll `GET /api/v1/guest/jobs/{job_id}`.

text.example: Welcome to EduAI. This platform uses artificial intelligence to help students and teachers create educational content instantly.

message.example: Audio job started. Poll the job status endpoint.

429.description: Daily limit reached — register for unlimited access

get.description: Poll the status of an async guest job (Presentation or Audio). No authentication required. Only works for guest jobs (user_id is null). Poll every 3–5 seconds until status is `succeeded` or `failed`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID returned from a tool creation endpoint

404.description: Job not found or not a guest job

post.description: Generate a Markdown mind map from a topic. No authentication required. **Limit: 3 per day per IP.** Result is returned immediately (synchronous).

result.example:
# AI in Education
- Benefits
  - Personalized learning
- Challenges

429.description: Daily limit reached — register for unlimited access

post.description: Start generating a presentation. No authentication required. **Limit: 2 per day per IP. Max 3 slides.** Processing is async — poll `GET /api/v1/guest/jobs/{job_id}` until status is `succeeded`.

topic.example: The Role of AI in Modern Education

message.example: Presentation job started. Poll the job status endpoint.

429.description: Daily limit reached — register for unlimited access

post.description: Generate a quiz from raw text. No authentication required. **Limit: 3 per day per IP. Max 3 questions per request.**

text.example: Binary search is an algorithm that finds the position of a target value within a sorted array...

429.description: Daily limit reached — register for unlimited access

post.description: Starts a background job to generate a presentation

topic.example: The utility of AI in Education

job_id.description: Use this ID to check status

get.description: Returns quiz info and shuffled options. Correct answers are NOT included.

post.description: Submit answers for a public quiz without needing to log in. Returns score immediately.

answers.description: Map of question_id to selected answer

get.description: Returns all quizzes created by the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a quiz from raw text or upload a PDF/DOCX/PPTX file. Processing is asynchronous — poll the status endpoint.

text.example: Binary search is an efficient algorithm...

message.example: Quiz creation started. Poll the status endpoint.

get.description: Returns full quiz details with all questions and correct answers. Owner only.
Poll this endpoint every 5 seconds after creating a quiz until status becomes 'done' or 'failed'.

post.description: Enable or disable the public shareable link for this quiz.
Submit answers for a quiz and receive the score immediately.

answers.description: Map of question_id to selected answer

get.description: Get a paginated list of recent background jobs for the authenticated user
Get the status and results of a background job

post.description: Starts a background job to generate a video explainer MP4. Poll GET /api/v1/jobs/{job_id} for status.

session_id.description: Existing session ID. Auto-created if omitted.

job_id.description: Use this ID with GET /api/v1/jobs/{job_id} to poll status

bearerAuth.description: Login with email and password to get the authentication token
bearerAuth.name: Token based Based

tags.name: 7. Guest Tools
tags.description: Public AI tools for unauthenticated users (rate-limited by IP)
